differential_diagnoses: Lyme disease (with carditis or pulmonary involvement)
Severe acute respiratory distress syndrome (ARDS) from viral pneumonia
next_steps: Perform serologic testing for Leptospira (MAT) and PCR for leptospiral DNA in blood and urine
Perform peripheral blood smear for intraerythrocytic parasites (Babesia)
Perform serum ferritin, triglycerides, and soluble CD25 to evaluate for secondary HLH
Consult infectious disease, pulmonology, and nephrology
Monitor serial lactate dehydrogenase, ferritin, and fibrinogen levels
Consider echocardiography to evaluate for pulmonary hypertension or myocarditis
Continue broad-spectrum antibiotic coverage (doxycycline/ceftriaxone) pending diagnostic results

differential_diagnoses: Severe Babesiosis with secondary organ failure
Q fever (Coxiella burnetii) pneumonia and hepatitis
next_steps: Perform microscopic agglutination test (MAT) for Leptospira serology
Perform PCR for Leptospira in blood and urine
Examine peripheral blood smear for intraerythrocytic parasites (Babesia)
Measure serum ferritin, triglycerides, fibrinogen, and soluble CD25 to assess for HLH
Check creatine kinase to rule out rhabdomyolysis
Order liver function tests, haptoglobin, LDH, and reticulocyte count to evaluate for hemolysis
Perform chest CT and serial monitoring of renal function and blood gases
Continue broad-spectrum empirical antibiotics (doxycycline and ceftriaxone) until diagnosis is confirmed
